  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Buffalo Group Nigeria, established in 2025, is a proudly registered Nigerian beverage company focused on the production, distribution, and sale of premium alcoholic drinks. In a market traditionally led by foreign brands, Buffalo Group Nigeria sets itself apart by combining authentic Nigerian heritage with modern beverage innovation. Our mission is to craft bold, refreshing drinks that meet international quality standards while creating a distinctive taste experience that resonates with both local and global consumers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Egbeda, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Responsibility for delivering accurate and timely first draft &amp; final management accounts, including both profit and loss reporting and balance sheet reconciliations.
	In charge of the Purchase Order process.
	Review weekly supplier payment runs, process payments according to vendors&#39; agreements, Group payment policy.
	Raise invoices.
	Analysis and reconciliations.
	Process and send invoices and statements.
	Makes and checks necessary calculations.
	Answers inquiries regarding work being performed?.
	Prepares or checks invoices, requisitions and other documents for processing.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@buffalogroupng.com&nbsp;,&nbsp;fehintolazainab85@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the&nbsp;subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Applicants living around or close to Egbeda preferably should apply.",

Accountant Job at Buffalo Group Nigeria




        
    

        
        Buffalo Group Nigeria, established in 2025, is a proudly registered Nigerian beverage company focused on the production, distribution, and sale of premium alcoholic drinks. In a market traditionally led by foreign brands, Buffalo Group Nigeria sets itself apart by combining authentic Nigerian heritage with modern beverage innovation. Our mission is to craft bold, refreshing drinks that meet international quality standards while creating a distinctive taste experience that resonates with both local and global consumers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Egbeda, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Responsibility for delivering accurate and timely first draft & final management accounts, including both profit and loss reporting and balance sheet reconciliations.
	In charge of the Purchase Order process.
	Review weekly supplier payment runs, process payments according to vendors' agreements, Group payment policy.
	Raise invoices.
	Analysis and reconciliations.
	Process and send invoices and statements.
	Makes and checks necessary calculations.
	Answers inquiries regarding work being performed?.
	Prepares or checks invoices, requisitions and other documents for processing.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] , [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Applicants living around or close to Egbeda preferably should apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Hotel Sunshine is an impressive 7th floor architectural landmark overlooking the scenic view of the Enugu metropolis A luxurious four star hotel that caters to business and leisure travelers with facilities of international standard. From the reception hall to the sky-bar, the d&eacute;cor is stylish and understated in line with international trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking an experienced and dynamic&nbsp;General Manager&nbsp;to lead our operations, drive profitability, and uphold the highest standards across all departments.
	The General Manager will be responsible for the overall management and strategic direction of the hotel.
	This includes overseeing daily operations, ensuring guest satisfaction, maximizing revenue, managing staff performance, and maintaining the brand&rsquo;s standards of excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide overall leadership and direction for all hotel departments including Front Office, Housekeeping, Food &amp; Beverage, Maintenance, and Finance.
	Develop and implement business strategies to achieve revenue targets and profitability goals.
	Ensure exceptional guest service standards are consistently maintained.
	Monitor financial performance, budgets, and cost control measures.
	Recruit, train, supervise, and evaluate management and staff.
	Maintain compliance with health, safety, and regulatory requirements.
	Build strong relationships with guests, corporate clients, and stakeholders.
	Oversee marketing and sales initiatives to drive occupancy and brand visibility.
	Handle high-level guest concerns and ensure prompt resolution.
	Prepare and present periodic operational and financial reports to management.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field (Master&rsquo;s degree is an added advantage).
	7&ndash;10 years of experience in hotel management, with at least 3&ndash;5 years in a senior leadership role.
	Strong leadership, organizational, and decision-making skills.
	Proven track record in revenue generation and operational efficiency.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High level of professionalism and integrity.
	Proficiency in hotel management software and Microsoft Office tools.


Key Competencies:


	Leadership &amp; Team Management
	Strategic Thinking &amp; Execution
	Financial Acumen
	Customer Focus
	Problem Solving &amp; Decision Making
	Business Development


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application letter to:&nbsp;hr@hotelsunshineng.com&nbsp;using the Job Positiion as the subject of the email.",

General Manager Job at Hotel Sunshine




        
    

        
        Hotel Sunshine is an impressive 7th floor architectural landmark overlooking the scenic view of the Enugu metropolis A luxurious four star hotel that caters to business and leisure travelers with facilities of international standard. From the reception hall to the sky-bar, the décor is stylish and understated in line with international trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and dynamic General Manager to lead our operations, drive profitability, and uphold the highest standards across all departments.
	The General Manager will be responsible for the overall management and strategic direction of the hotel.
	This includes overseeing daily operations, ensuring guest satisfaction, maximizing revenue, managing staff performance, and maintaining the brand’s standards of excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide overall leadership and direction for all hotel departments including Front Office, Housekeeping, Food & Beverage, Maintenance, and Finance.
	Develop and implement business strategies to achieve revenue targets and profitability goals.
	Ensure exceptional guest service standards are consistently maintained.
	Monitor financial performance, budgets, and cost control measures.
	Recruit, train, supervise, and evaluate management and staff.
	Maintain compliance with health, safety, and regulatory requirements.
	Build strong relationships with guests, corporate clients, and stakeholders.
	Oversee marketing and sales initiatives to drive occupancy and brand visibility.
	Handle high-level guest concerns and ensure prompt resolution.
	Prepare and present periodic operational and financial reports to management.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field (Master’s degree is an added advantage).
	7–10 years of experience in hotel management, with at least 3–5 years in a senior leadership role.
	Strong leadership, organizational, and decision-making skills.
	Proven track record in revenue generation and operational efficiency.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High level of professionalism and integrity.
	Proficiency in hotel management software and Microsoft Office tools.


Key Competencies:


	Leadership & Team Management
	Strategic Thinking & Execution
	Financial Acumen
	Customer Focus
	Problem Solving & Decision Making
	Business Development


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application letter to: [email protected] using the Job Positiion as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Mikano International Limited
content:
Mikano International Limited is recognized as a distinguished solution provider with an extensive portfolio of five divisions with over 27 years of operation in Nigeria; Power Generation, Steel Fabrication, Electrical Products and Solutions, Heavy Construction Equipment and Forklifts and Mikano Motors. Alongside with its sister companies Mikano Construction Limited, Mikano Foods Limited and Mikano Medical Limited.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Mikano International Limited was established in 1993 with the objective of carrying out quality and dependable power generating products. Its business included sales, servicing, maintenance, overhauling and rentals of Diesel and gas power generating sets. Since its establishment, it has been contributing to the development of the power sector in the Nigerian economy, and became a nation leader in our market as a one-stop-shop for Power Solution.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) HIAB Driver

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A HIAB driver (lorry-mounted crane operator) is responsible fordriving specialized trucks to transport goods and operating the hydraulic crane to load, unload, and position heavy materials.


Responsibilities


	Crane Operation: Safely operate lorry-mounted cranes (HIAB) to lift and position heavy items.
	Driving/Transport: Drive heavy goods vehicles (HGV) to transport materials to and from sites safely and efficiently.
	Load Security: Secure loads securely to the vehicle before transporting.
	Maintenance: Perform daily pre- and post-trip inspections, including maintenance of the crane and truck.
	Compliance & Safety: Adhere strictly to traffic laws and workplace health and safety protocols.
	Documentation: Maintain accurate logs of deliveries and inspections.


Requirements


	Experience: Proven experience operating a HIAB or similar lorry-mounted crane.
	Physical Ability: Ability to perform manual work, which may involve working outdoors in various weather conditions.


Salary & Benefits


	Salary: N120,000 net monthly.
	Transport Allowance, Overtime, HMO and Leave Allowance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Generator Operator

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Responsible for controlling and operating a generator set to ensure uninterrupted power supply at the site.


Responsibilities


	Ensure availability of power at the site
	Perform daily maintenance of the generator set
	Record utility and parameter readings
	Conduct daily fuel checks to ascertain quantity remaining
	Gauge generator oil and coolant daily


Requirements


	Trade Test/OND in Engineering or related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar role
	Extensive experience in electrical repairs
	General knowledge of electrical tasks
	Ability to operate a soundproof generator set.


Salary


	N156,000 – N172,000 monthly


Benefits:


	N90,000 Monthly Allowance, Leave Allowance, and HMO


Click here to apply online

 

3.) Welder

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Responsible for Welds and assembling metal pieces and products by using handheld welding equipment
	Sets up parts for welding; uses hand tools, clamps, jigs, and fixtures. Works from specifications, drawings, and weld symbols.


Responsibilities


	Ensuring that all measurements and drawings are being followed.
	Sourcing the materials to be used in the project.
	Measuring and cutting materials to specifications.
	Welding materials using the correct materials to join the metals together
	To ensure that the management time is not wasted.
	To ensure that his section is arranged before the closing hour.
	Checking finished work to make sure that it falls within the tolerances marked on the blueprints.
	To fabricate a good job at a given time.
	Ensuring that all measurements and drawings are being followed.
	To reduce errors in terms of construction.
	Meeting all daily targets.
	Ability to weld pipe.


Requirements


	Minimum of Trade Test Certificate.
	At least 3 years of work experience in a similar industry.
	Ability to read blueprints and technical diagrams


Benefits


	Salary: N170,000 per month.
	Benefits: Transport Allowance, Leave allowance, HMO & Pension.


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Sage Grey Finance Limited
content:
Sage Grey Finance Limited (“Sage Grey Finance” or “the Company”) is a finance services company incorporated in Nigeria. We are licensed and regulated by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and are integrated into the Nigerian Interbank Settlement System (NIBSS). We are members of the Finance Houses Association of Nigeria (FHAN). We offer Lending Services (Project Finance, Asset Finance, Corporate finance, Consumer Loan, etc.), Fund Management Services, Advisory Services, and other services as authorized by the Central Bank of Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Corporate Communications Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Corporate Communications Officer is responsible for developing, coordinating and executing the Company’s corporate communications, brand positioning and stakeholder engagement strategies ensuring that all messaging, brand positioning, and public-facing activities are aligned with the Company’s overall business objectives.
	The Officer shall ensure that the Company maintains a consistent, credible and compelling narrative across all channels, while strengthening its public image and institutional reputation.
	The role drives internal and external communications, brand visibility, reputation and perception management, as well as implementation of Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives.
	The Corporate Communications Officer will lead digital communications, media relations and the planning and execution of corporate events and campaigns, enhancing the Company’s visibility and shall report to the Vice President, Legal & Risk.


Key Responsibiliies


	Develop and implement a comprehensive corporate communications strategy aligned with business objectives.
	Enhance brand visibility, positioning and public perception across all channels.
	Manage and coordinate Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives.
	Drive consistent, clear and effective internal and external communications.
	Strengthen stakeholder engagement, including media, partners and the public.
	Oversee social media presence, digital communications and online reputation management.
	Plan and execute corporate events, campaigns and brand activations.
	Ensure alignment of messaging across all platforms and touchpoints.
	Promote the Company’s values, culture and impact narrative.


Performance Evaluation


	Effectiveness of communication strategy execution
	Growth in brand visibility and awareness
	Quality and impact of CSR initiatives
	Media coverage and public perception
	Social media engagement and digital performance
	Success of events and campaigns
	Stakeholder engagement effectiveness
	Quality and consistency of messaging
	Responsiveness to communication needs and crises


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Communications, Public Relations, Marketing, Journalism, or related field.
	1–2 years of experience in corporate communications, PR, or brand management.
	Knowledge in CSR & ESG is an added advantage.
	Strong writing, storytelling, and content development skills.
	Experience managing social media platforms and digital campaigns.
	Proven ability to manage events and stakeholder engagements.
	Strong interpersonal and relationship management skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.


Application Closing Date: 14th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Posiotion as subject of the mail.

 

2.) Senior Business Analyst

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Posting


	The Senior Business Analyst is responsible for end-to-end technical analysis, systems design support, and coordination of software lifecycle activities.
	This role bridges the gap between functional business needs and technical implementation, ensuring high-quality system delivery through structured requirements engineering, process modeling, API documentation, and testing coordination.
	The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience working with development teams, system architects, and DevOps, and will leverage AI-based tools to enhance technical documentation, prototyping, and validation. The role involves leading and mentoring cross-functional teams, coordinating deliverables, and ensuring alignment across stakeholders to drive successful project execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct technical stakeholder sessions to gather, validate, and document functional and non functional requirements.
	Define and manage system-level specifications including user stories, sequence diagrams, state transition diagrams, and data dictionaries.
	Lead a cross-functional team of business analysts, designers, and engineers.
	Collaborate with developers and solution architects to define technical scope and break down requirements into modular components.
	Maintain and update system design documentation across sprints/releases.
	Define data schemas, interface definitions, and endpoint documentation for REST/SOAP APIs.
	Coordinate with backend developers and third-party service providers on integration flows and authentication protocols.
	Model current state (as-is) and future state (to-be) business processes using BPMN/UML.
	Recommend system enhancements based on gap analysis and bottleneck identification.
	Facilitate Agile ceremonies including daily stand-ups, sprint planning, sprint reviews, and retrospectives.
	Perform feasibility studies and cost-benefit analysis for proposed features or system changes.
	Assess system impacts due to changes in architecture, data structure, or third-party dependencies
	Support DevOps and QA by coordinating test environment readiness, deployment schedules, and rollback planning.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Finance or related fields.
	5+ years of experience as a Technical Business Analyst, Systems Analyst, or Solution Analyst. With at least 2 years in a leadership role.
	CBAP (Certified Business Analysis Professional) certification is an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of: SDLC, Agile/Scrum, System architecture (microservices, event-driven, monolith), API standards (REST, JSON, XML, OAuth2), Database concepts (SQL/NoSQL).
	Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and system monitoring concepts is a plus
	Hands-on experience with tools like Postman, Swagger/OpenAPI, Draw.io/Lucidchart, Figma, Git, Jira, Confluence.
	Working knowledge of APIs, databases, and modern web architecture is an added advantage.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively across teams.
	Excellent leadership, problem-solving and communication skills.


Application Closing Date: 15th April, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Business Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Posting


	The Business Analyst will play a key role in supporting the development and enhancement of product software.
	You will collaborate with product, engineering, sales, and customer success teams to gather requirements, analyze data, and provide insights that influence product roadmaps and customer success strategies.
	The Analyst will serve as a vital link between the technical team (developers and designers) and the business team, ensuring that business needs are effectively translated into technical requirements and that the final product aligns with organizational goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate and communicate effectively with software developers and UI/UX designers.
	Develop and manage project documentation including user stories, use cases, process flows, and wireframes.
	Participate in sprint planning and review meetings
	Monitor project performance and prepare reports for stakeholders.
	Monitor development progress and ensure alignment with agreed deliverables.
	Conduct system and user acceptance testing (UAT) to ensure the solution meets business expectations.
	Identify and resolve any functional or design-related issues during the project lifecycle.
	Present regular project updates, demos, and test results to the management team
	Provide support during implementation and post-launch stabilization phase.
	Collaborate with product, operations, finance, marketing and technology teams to align goals.
	Complete other duties at the discretion of management.
	Analyze market trends, product usage, and operational data for actionable insights.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Computer Science, Finance or related fields.
	0-2 years of experience in business analysis or product management.
	Experience working on finance, public sector, or eCommerce-related projects is a plus.
	Proficiency with documentation tools (e.g. Confluence, Notion, Word) and project tools (e.g. Trello, Jira, Asana).
	Strong analytical, communication, and presentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively across teams.


Application Closing Date: 15th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "",
  "description": "Straight-Gate Publishers Limited is one of Nigeria&#39;s leading educational publisher. It was incorporated as a private liability company in 1997. Straight-Gate Publishers Limited has since been concerned with building a reputation for sound intellectual contents of all its titles. Straight-Gate Publishers Limitedis also engaged in the business of printing and publishing of religious and general titles. We serve as educational representative to foreign publishers located in different parts of the world. We have an effective coverage of all parts of the country through our dynamic representatives in cities and towns nationwide.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.)&nbsp;Typesetter

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	Typesetting involves arranging text and visuals according to a specialized design and creating finalized documents prepared for printing.
	As a typesetter at Straight Gate Publishers Limited, you are required to have both design and technical skills.
	These skills are needed to create designs that are visually appealing and reader-friendly documents.
	Ensuring that the final product corresponds with the publisher&rsquo;s standards and specifications.


Job Duties


	Creatively format text by applying appropriate font styles, sizes, and spacing as per specifications to enhance readability and comprehension for readers.
	Creating layout designs for various publications, and strategically arranging text within columns, pages, and sections to ensure consistency in fonts and designs while adhering to the publisher&#39;s branding guidelines.
	Diligently perform thorough proofreading to identify and correct typographical errors, grammatical mistakes, and formatting issues to ensure accuracy.
	Seamlessly incorporate visuals, graphics, and illustrations into the material to enrich the design and enhance the reader&rsquo;s engagement.
	Carefully maintain accurate word breaks and spacing to achieve well-structured and neatly aligned columns.
	Effectively use typesetting software and desktop publishing tools, such as CorelDraw, to efficiently execute layout and formatting tasks.
	Actively collaborate with editors, designers, and other publishing teams to ensure a smooth transition of design concepts into the finished product.


Key Requirements


	Applicant must be computer Literate, while a National Diploma (ND) in Art or any related discipline with experience in desktop publishing can be an added advantage.
	Applicant must be Proficient in the use of CorelDraw software for creating and editing illustrations, graphics, and layout elements in the book design process.
	Ability to accurately format and layout text, ensuring proper font usage, line spacing, margins, and other typographic considerations.
	Ability to design is an added advantage.
	Applicant&#39;s ability to identify errors is an important skill needed for this position.
	Ability to type Yoruba language effectively.
	Minimum of two years cognate experience in typesetting with a publishing company or in a related company.
	Ability to communicate effectively in English Language.
	Must have good interpersonal skills.
	He/she must be attentive to detail, including the ability to spot and correct typographical errors and formatting inconsistencies, and must have an understanding of graphics designs.
	Qualified candidates must be proficient in the use of relevant computer software and must be competent with the use of tools for typesetting and layout work.
	The ability to work efficiently, meet deadlines, and manage their time effectively to keep production schedules on track is important.
	Familiarity with the book publishing process, from manuscript to printed book, is an added advantage, and this includes an understanding of prepress, printing, and binding.
	Prior experience in a publishing firm, especially in a typesetting role, is an added advantage.
	Familiarity with Adobe InDesign is also an added advantage.


Salary
N100,000 - N130,000 per month.&nbsp;

Application Closing Date:&nbsp;30th April, 2026.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@straightgatepublishers.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

2.)&nbsp;HR Generalist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan North, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Human Resources Generalist will be responsible for managing all core HR functions while serving as a strategic partner to management in driving organizational performance, structure, and growth.
	The role goes beyond administrative HR and requires a proactive professional who can align people management with business objectives, enforce accountability, strengthen systems, and support leadership in decision-making.


Duties and Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end recruitment processes including job postings, screening, interviews, selection, and onboarding
	Develop and maintain structured HR systems, templates, and documentation
	Create, implement, and continuously improve HR policies, processes, and frameworks to support organizational growth
	Drive performance management by developing KPIs, coordinating appraisals, and monitoring staff productivity across departments
	Provide HR insights to Management to support decision-making on staffing, performance, discipline, and organizational structure
	Identify workforce gaps and recommend practical solutions to improve efficiency and output
	Manage employee relations by handling grievances, conflict resolution, and ensuring a professional work environment
	Oversee disciplinary processes including queries, warnings, suspensions, and terminations in line with company policy
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date employee records, attendance, and leave tracking systems manually or via basic tools
	Coordinate staff welfare, engagement, and communication initiatives
	Support training and development by identifying skill gaps and organizing learning interventions
	Monitor staff compliance with company policies and enforce accountability across all levels
	Prepare periodic HR reports (staff performance, attendance, turnover, etc.) and provide actionable insights
	Collaborate with department heads (Sales, Warehouse, Admin) to align people management with operational needs
	Ensure proper role definition, structure, and clarity across the organization
	Drive a culture of discipline, responsibility, and performance within the workforce
	Continuously review existing systems and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and control.


Skills and Educational Qualifications Required


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related Fields
	2 - 4 years relevant HR/Admin experience
	Strong knowledge of core HR functions and processes
	Ability to build structure and systems from scratch (non-ERP environment)
	Strategic thinking with strong business and operational awareness
	High level of integrity and ability to handle confidential information
	Strong leadership and assertiveness in enforcing policies and discipline
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution ability
	Strong organizational and documentation skills
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
	High attention to detail and accuracy
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, Word, Google Workspace, etc.)
	Results-driven mindset with a focus on performance and accountability.


Competencies required:


	Strong knowledge of core HR functions and processes
	Ability to build structure and systems from scratch
	Strategic thinking with strong business and operational awareness
	High level of integrity and ability to handle confidential information
	Strong leadership and assertiveness in enforcing policies and discipline
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution ability
	Strong organizational and documentation skills
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
	High attention to detail and accuracy
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, Word, Google Workspace, etc.)
	Results-driven mindset with a focus on performance and accountability.


Application Closing Date:&nbsp;13th April, 2026.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@straightgatepublishers.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

3.)&nbsp;National Sales Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	The National Sales Manager will be responsible for driving nationwide sales performance, managing and supervising all sales representatives, and ensuring revenue targets are achieved.
	The role requires strong leadership, accountability, and the ability to enforce discipline within the sales team, particularly in the areas of sales execution, fund management, and debt control. The ideal candidate must be proactive, results-driven, and able to identify and address gaps in the sales system to improve overall business performance.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and mentor the sales and marketing teams, setting clear goals and strategies to meet and exceed goals, drive revenue growth and market expansion.
	Develop and implement comprehensive sales and marketing strategies aligned with company objectives.
	Manage, motivate, and develop the sales and marketing teams, ensuring collaboration and continuous improvement.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, partnerships, and revenue streams to enhance the company&#39;s market position.
	Conduct in-depth market analysis, monitor industry trends, and provide insights to inform strategic decision-making.
	Conduct regular visits to sales representatives&#39; territories to support and guide their activities.
	Implement strategies to prevent, reduce and recover debts and monitor outstanding accounts.
	Oversee and optimize the daily sales activities, identifying areas for improvement, and implementing effective strategies to drive sales growth.
	Contribute to the development of sales policies, procedures, and guidelines that support a proactive and results-driven sales approach.
	Host Sales Strategy &amp; Assessment meetings to provide valuable insights and contribute to the development of sales plans and strategies
	Efficiently handle and supervise all incoming sales inquiries, demonstrating a comprehensive understanding of our products/services and providing tailored solutions to meet customer needs.
	Proactively identify and address any challenges or concerns related to the sales process, collaborating with internal teams to implement effective solutions and ensure customer satisfaction.


Skills &amp; Educational Qualification


	A Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or any related discipline; a postgraduate qualification (MBA) will be an advantage
	5-10 years relevant experience leading sales teams, preferably in the publishing Industry
	Demonstrated ability to lead, build, and manage high-performing sales teams
	Strong understanding of market dynamics, sales strategies, and emerging marketing channels
	Sound analytical and strategic thinking skills with the ability to translate insights into results
	High emotional intelligence with the ability to manage relationships, influence teams, and resolve conflicts effectively
	Results-oriented mindset with a strong drive for performance and target achievement
	Proven capacity to identify growth opportunities and deliver consistent business expansion
	Practical experience in managing collections, debt recovery, and enforcing financial accountability
	Good understanding of operational controls, compliance, and structured reporting systems
	Strong leadership presence with the ability to instill discipline and a performance-driven culture
	Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and driving revenue growth
	Strong pipeline management and business development skills
	Expertise in key account management and client relationship building
	Ability to develop and execute effective sales strategies nationwide
	Data-driven decision-making and proficiency with CRM tools
	Excellent negotiation, presentation, and communication skills
	Market research and competitive analysis capabilities
	Highly self-motivated, results-oriented, and goal-driven
	Strategic thinker with strong business acumen and resilience.


Application Closing Date:&nbsp;15th April, 2026.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@straightgatepublishers.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Straight-Gate Publishers Limited has since been concerned with building a reputation for sound intellectual contents of all its titles. Straight-Gate Publishers Limitedis also engaged in the business of printing and publishing of religious and general titles. We serve as educational representative to foreign publishers located in different parts of the world. We have an effective coverage of all parts of the country through our dynamic representatives in cities and towns nationwide.

3.) National Sales Manager

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	The National Sales Manager will be responsible for driving nationwide sales performance, managing and supervising all sales representatives, and ensuring revenue targets are achieved.
	The role requires strong leadership, accountability, and the ability to enforce discipline within the sales team, particularly in the areas of sales execution, fund management, and debt control. The ideal candidate must be proactive, results-driven, and able to identify and address gaps in the sales system to improve overall business performance.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and mentor the sales and marketing teams, setting clear goals and strategies to meet and exceed goals, drive revenue growth and market expansion.
	Develop and implement comprehensive sales and marketing strategies aligned with company objectives.
	Manage, motivate, and develop the sales and marketing teams, ensuring collaboration and continuous improvement.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, partnerships, and revenue streams to enhance the company's market position.
	Conduct in-depth market analysis, monitor industry trends, and provide insights to inform strategic decision-making.
	Conduct regular visits to sales representatives' territories to support and guide their activities.
	Implement strategies to prevent, reduce and recover debts and monitor outstanding accounts.
	Oversee and optimize the daily sales activities, identifying areas for improvement, and implementing effective strategies to drive sales growth.
	Contribute to the development of sales policies, procedures, and guidelines that support a proactive and results-driven sales approach.
	Host Sales Strategy & Assessment meetings to provide valuable insights and contribute to the development of sales plans and strategies
	Efficiently handle and supervise all incoming sales inquiries, demonstrating a comprehensive understanding of our products/services and providing tailored solutions to meet customer needs.
	Proactively identify and address any challenges or concerns related to the sales process, collaborating with internal teams to implement effective solutions and ensure customer satisfaction.


Skills & Educational Qualification


	A Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or any related discipline; a postgraduate qualification (MBA) will be an advantage
	5-10 years relevant experience leading sales teams, preferably in the publishing Industry
	Demonstrated ability to lead, build, and manage high-performing sales teams
	Strong understanding of market dynamics, sales strategies, and emerging marketing channels
	Sound analytical and strategic thinking skills with the ability to translate insights into results
	High emotional intelligence with the ability to manage relationships, influence teams, and resolve conflicts effectively
	Results-oriented mindset with a strong drive for performance and target achievement
	Proven capacity to identify growth opportunities and deliver consistent business expansion
	Practical experience in managing collections, debt recovery, and enforcing financial accountability
	Good understanding of operational controls, compliance, and structured reporting systems
	Strong leadership presence with the ability to instill discipline and a performance-driven culture
	Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and driving revenue growth
	Strong pipeline management and business development skills
	Expertise in key account management and client relationship building
	Ability to develop and execute effective sales strategies nationwide
	Data-driven decision-making and proficiency with CRM tools
	Excellent negotiation, presentation, and communication skills
	Market research and competitive analysis capabilities
	Highly self-motivated, results-oriented, and goal-driven
	Strategic thinker with strong business acumen and resilience.


Application Closing Date: 15th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
